scripts.bw:test: bun cli run -o plain test bw --
scripts.bw:lint: bun cli run -o plain lint bw --
scripts.bw:build: bun cli run -o plain build bw --
scripts.bw:build:test: bun cli run -o plain build:test bw --
scripts.docs:lint: bun cli run -o plain lint doc-website --
scripts.docs:dev: bun cli run -o plain dev doc-website --
scripts.docs:build: bun cli run -o plain build doc-website --
scripts.docs:build:dev: bun cli run -o plain build:dev doc-website --
scripts.docs:preview: bun cli run -o plain preview doc-website --
scripts.sandbox:api:local: bun cli run api:local sandbox -o plain --
scripts.sandbox:api:release: bun cli run api:release sandbox -o plain --
